uncovered_waiver.reason: OMN-14817 hand-flips node_impact_analyzer_compute to canonical def-B (handle(request), OMN-14781 path): the two-arg analyze(trigger, registry) op-method is replaced by handle() over a single ModelImpactAnalysisRequest, and the OMN-3925 scoring helpers (_score_artifact/_count_matches/_assign_action/_level_to_policy/_pattern_to_reason_code) are preserved byte-identically base_ref<->HEAD, re-derived from git by the canonical-shape ratchet (.handflip.json). Equivalence is proven by that git-verbatim preservation plus the green parity tests over the corpus, NOT by branch coverage. The measured branch_coverage_pct is deflated because adequacy recording traces an already-imported handler module, so its import + class/method-definition block registers as uncovered; the sole missing reachable branch arc is the unreachable _level_to_policy fallback (the numeric policy level is always 0-3, which always matches inside the loop).
